questions.context_sentence: What are you doing right now?
questions.hint: 组合记忆：Right (正确的/就在这里) + Now (现在)，强调‘就是现在’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你现在在做什么？

questions.context_sentence: riding a bike
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：‘来得’快。骑车总是比走路‘来得’快。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 骑自行车

questions.prompt: I'd love to, but I'm ____ on something important. (提示: 做；从事)
questions.context_sentence: I'd love to, but I'm working on something important.
questions.hint: 形象记忆：在 (on) 某件事上面工作 (work)，就是在‘从事/忙于’它。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我很想去，但是我正在做一些重要的事情。

questions.context_sentence: Hold on. Here's Mum.
questions.hint: 动作记忆：Hold (抓住) + On (不放)，抓住电话线不放，就是‘别挂断’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 等一下。妈妈来了。

questions.context_sentence: What are the boys kicking?
questions.hint: 动作记忆：K 像一条伸出去‘踢’的腿。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 男孩们在踢什么？

questions.context_sentence: I hope it all goes well!
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：‘好铺’。希望能有一条‘好铺’的成功之路。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我希望一切顺利！

questions.context_sentence: Are you skating?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：S 形滑行 + Kate (凯特)，凯特在滑冰。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你在滑冰吗？

questions.prompt: What is ____ in different time zones?
questions.context_sentence: What is happening in different time zones around the world right now?
questions.hint: 词根记忆：Hap (机会/运气)。偶然发生的事情就是 happen。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 现在世界各地不同的时区正在发生什么？

questions.prompt: Some people are ____ to get home from work.
questions.context_sentence: Some people are rushing to get home from work.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：‘热射’。天气太热被太阳‘射’，所以要赶紧‘冲’回家。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 有些人正匆忙地赶回家。

questions.prompt: Lights are ____ brightly across the city.
questions.context_sentence: Lights are shining brightly across the city
questions.hint: 形象记忆：S 代表 Sun (太阳)，太阳在发光。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 灯光照亮了整个城市

questions.prompt: Bright yellow taxis are picking up and ____ passengers.
questions.context_sentence: picking up and dropping off passengers.
questions.hint: 动作记忆：Drop (落下) + Off (离开)，让乘客落下去自己离开，就是‘送到某处放下’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 接送乘客。

questions.prompt: Can you ____ why the time is different? (提示: 解释；说明)
questions.context_sentence: Can you explain why the time is different...?
questions.hint: 词根记忆：Ex- (出) + Plain (平坦/清晰)，把事情变清晰说出来就是‘解释’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你能解释一下为什么时间不一样吗...？

questions.prompt: Our family are ____ part in a boat tour.
questions.context_sentence: Our family are taking part in a boat tour
questions.hint: 联想记忆：拿走 (take) 一部分 (part) 责任或时间进入 (in) 活动，就是‘参加’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们全家正在参加一个乘船游览。

questions.context_sentence: I'm driving to work today
questions.hint: 联想记忆：D (Driver 司机) + R (Road 路) + Ive (我)，我在路上当司机‘开车’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我今天开车去上班

questions.context_sentence: find out more about the way of life in different places around the world.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：a round (一个圆圈) 绕着 world (世界) 跑，就是去‘世界各地’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 了解更多关于世界各地不同地方的生活方式。

questions.context_sentence: What are you doing at the moment?
questions.hint: 词根记忆：mo- (move 移动) + -ment (名词后缀)，时间移动的一个小点就是‘时刻’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你现在在做什么？

questions.context_sentence: Are you making them for the Dragon Boat Festival?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Feast (宴会) 的变体，有宴会的地方就是‘节日’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你们做这些是为了端午节吗？

questions.context_sentence: It's great to hear your voice!
questions.hint: 比较记忆：Sound 指任何声音，Voice 专指人的‘嗓音’（有V的人类嗓音）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 很高兴听到你的声音！

questions.context_sentence: watching dragon boat races on TV.
questions.hint: 形象记忆：R 像跑动的人，Race 就是大家一起跑的‘比赛’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在电视上看赛龙舟。

questions.context_sentence: When you call somebody
questions.hint: 合成词：Some (一些/某个) + Body (身体/人)，即‘某个人’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 当你给某人打电话的时候

questions.context_sentence: Can I take a message?
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：‘买手机’。买手机是为了发 message (信息)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我可以帮你留言吗？

questions.context_sentence: She is taking an online class in her room.
questions.hint: 组合记忆：On (在...上) + Line (线/网线)，连在线上就是‘在线’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 她正在房间里上网络课。

questions.context_sentence: It's a kind of shuttlecock.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Shuttle (穿梭) + Cock (公鸡/羽毛)，在网间穿梭的羽毛球。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 它是一种毽子。

questions.context_sentence: My uncle is showing us all the sights.
questions.hint: 词根记忆：与 see 有关。眼睛能看到 (see) 的美丽东西就是 sight (名胜)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我的叔叔正在带我们参观所有的景点。

questions.context_sentence: I know it's near your exams.
questions.hint: 缩写记忆：Examination 的缩写，ex- (出/结果) + -am (我是)，考试测出‘我是谁’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我知道你的考试快到了。

questions.context_sentence: I'm looking forward to seeing you soon!
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：for- (向/前) + -ward (方向)，合起来就是‘向前’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我期待很快见到你！

questions.context_sentence: I'm looking forward to seeing you soon!
questions.hint: 形象记忆：目光 (look) 向前 (forward) 看，代表你很‘期待’未来的见面。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我期待很快见到你！

questions.context_sentence: What is happening in different time zones...
questions.hint: 组合记忆：Time (时间) + Zone (区域)，划分时间的区域就是‘时区’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在不同的时区发生了什么……

questions.context_sentence: But others are not in a hurry!
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Hurry (快) 就像火 (huo) 一样急，in a hurry 就是‘在急忙中’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 但是其他人并不着急！

questions.context_sentence: Lights are shining brightly across the city
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：Bright (明亮的) + -ly (副词后缀)，表示‘明亮地’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 灯光照亮了整个城市

questions.context_sentence: and colourful boats are moving slowly
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：Colour (颜色) + -ful (充满...的)，充满颜色的就是‘色彩鲜艳的’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 而且五颜六色的船只正在缓慢移动

questions.context_sentence: colourful boats are moving slowly down the river.
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：Slow (慢) + -ly (副词后缀)，‘缓慢地’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 五颜六色的船只正沿着河流缓缓移动。

questions.context_sentence: eating delicious food, such as Chongqing hot pot
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Such (这样) + As (作为)，作为这样的例子，即‘例如’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 吃美味的食物，比如重庆火锅

questions.context_sentence: shopping for gifts, such as paintings and bags
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：Paint (画) + -ing (名词后缀)，画出来的成果就是‘绘画作品’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 购买礼物，比如绘画和包

questions.context_sentence: in the markets.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Mark (标记/价格) + et (小地方)，标记价格进行交易的小地方就是‘市场’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在市场上。

questions.context_sentence: people live side by side with many wonderful animals!
questions.hint: 形象记忆：一边 (side) 靠着另一边 (side)，就是‘肩并肩’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 人们与许多奇妙的动物生活在一起！

questions.context_sentence: Many people are rushing to the subway.
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：Sub- (在下面) + Way (路)，地底下的路就是‘地铁’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 很多人都在赶着去地铁站。

questions.context_sentence: picking up and dropping off passengers.
questions.hint: 词根记忆：Pass (经过) + -en- + -ger (人)，‘路过/经过’这段路的人就是‘乘客’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 接送乘客。

questions.context_sentence: jogging, walking, and riding bikes in Central Park.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Center (中心) 的形容词形式，-al 结尾通常是形容词。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在中央公园慢跑、散步和骑自行车。

questions.context_sentence: Our family are taking part in a boat tour
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：‘突儿’。突然想去旅游，去突袭一圈儿。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们全家正在参加一个乘船游览。

questions.context_sentence: taking a long time because it's rush hour.
questions.hint: 组合记忆：Rush (冲/急) + Hour (小时)，大家都急着冲的小时就是‘高峰期’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 因为是高峰期，所以要花很长时间。

questions.context_sentence: Can you explain how it can be daytime in one city...?
questions.hint: 合成词：Day (日子) + Time (时间)，日子里的时间即‘白昼’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你能解释一下为什么在一个城市是白天……？

questions.context_sentence: We're having a holiday here.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Holy (神圣的) + Day (日子)，古代神圣的日子就是大家休息的‘假期’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们在这里度假。

questions.context_sentence: It's so powerful!
questions.hint: 词缀记忆：Power (力量) + -ful (充满)，充满力量就是‘强大的’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 它太强大了！

questions.context_sentence: We're wearing raincoats but are still getting very wet!
questions.hint: 组合记忆：Rain (雨) + Coat (外套)，下雨穿的外套就是‘雨衣’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们穿着雨衣，但还是被淋得很湿！

questions.context_sentence: others are sunbathing or playing games on the beach.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Sun (太阳) + Bath (洗澡)，在阳光里洗澡就是‘日光浴’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 其他人正在海滩上晒日光浴或玩游戏。

questions.context_sentence: It's tricky, but I think I'm making good progress.
questions.hint: 词根记忆：Trick (诡计) + -y (形容词)，像诡计一样变幻莫测，所以‘难办’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这很棘手，但我觉得我正在取得不错的进展。

questions.context_sentence: I think I'm making good progress.
questions.hint: 词根记忆：Pro- (向前) + Gress (走)，向前走就是‘进步’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我觉得我正在取得良好的进展。

questions.context_sentence: Are you making them for the Dragon Boat Festival?
questions.hint: 拆分记忆：drag (拖曳) + on (在...上)，龙在云端‘拖曳’而行。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你们做这些是为了端午节吗？

questions.context_sentence: Bye, darling!
questions.hint: 词源记忆：Dear (亲爱的) + -ling (小)，就是‘亲爱的小宝贝’。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 再见，亲爱的！
